text.tspan: BEST FIT:
u2022 single-language org (one discovery client suffices)
u2022 latency-sensitive (no extra hop)
u2022 want smart LB (zone-aware, latency-aware)
u2022 willing to put logic in apps
EXAMPLES:
u2022 Netflix circa Eureka + Ribbon (Java-heavy)
u2022 Spring Cloud LoadBalancer
u2022 gRPC with name-resolution + LB plugin
BEST FIT:
u2022 polyglot org (Python, Go, Java, Node, ...)
u2022 want centralized LB policy
u2022 OK paying one network hop
u2022 want zero discovery code in apps
EXAMPLES:
u2022 Kubernetes Service / ingress
u2022 AWS ALB / NLB
u2022 Envoy + control plane (= service mesh)
EVOLUTION (typical mature org):
u2022 sidecar Envoy per pod (server-side from app's view)
u2022 Envoy itself does client-side LB to upstream pods
u2022 control plane (Istio, Linkerd) keeps Envoys in sync
RESULT:
u2022 apps see DNS-based 'just call this name' (server-side simplicity)
u2022 Envoy does zone-aware, latency-aware LB (client-side smarts)
u2022 control plane abstracts the registry from both
